books.title: The Maltese Falcon
books.author: Dashiell Hammett
books.summary: A detective becomes embroiled in a series of murders and intrigues, all seemingly related to a mysterious figurine.

books.title: The Nibelungenlied
books.author: Anonymous
books.summary: The epic poem that follows the legendary hero Siegfried on his adventures, his death, and his wife’s revenge.

books.title: Pointed Roofs
books.author: Dorothy M. Richardson
books.summary: Seventeen-year-old Miriam Henderson is sent to Germany to teach English at a finishing school in Hanover.

books.title: Tombstone
books.author: Walter Noble Burns
books.summary: An embellished retelling of the town of Tombstone, Arizona, during its heyday in the late 19th century, featuring famous heroes and outlaws of the American Old West.

books.title: The Mystery at Lilac Inn
books.author: Carolyn Keene
books.summary: A young amateur detective attempts to recover her friend’s stolen diamonds.

books.title: Man and Superman
books.author: George Bernard Shaw
books.summary: Jack Tanner flees both London and responsibility when he is made guardian of his childhood friend Ann Whitehead.

books.title: Cymbeline
books.author: William Shakespeare
books.summary: A British princess marries a poor gentleman against her father the King’s wishes.

books.title: Lud-in-the-Mist
books.author: Hope Mirrlees
books.summary: After more than two hundred years of stability, a sudden surge in contraband fairy fruit threatens the peace and mental heath of citizens in the borderland town of Lud-in-the-Mist.

books.title: The Triumph of the Scarlet Pimpernel
books.author: Baroness Orczy
books.summary: A woman is kidnapped in order to trap her husband.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Edgar Allan Poe
books.summary: A collection of Edgar Allan Poe’s short fiction, ordered by date of publication.

books.title: The Mirror of the Sea
books.author: Joseph Conrad
books.summary: An autobiographical memoir on Joseph Conrad’s maritime experiences and his relationship with the sea.

books.title: The Mystery of the Blue Train
books.author: Agatha Christie
books.summary: A retired detective finds himself at the scene of a murder aboard a French locomotive.

books.title: Roads to Freedom
books.author: Bertrand Russell
books.summary: Bertrand Russell investigates the merits and potential shortcomings of different socialist tendencies.

books.title: Short Works
books.author: Epictetus
books.summary: A collection of Epictetus’s short works.

books.title: Poetry
books.author: Edgar Allan Poe
books.summary: A collection of Edgar Allan Poe’s poetry.

books.title: Point Counter Point
books.author: Aldous Huxley
books.summary: Several connected stories are interwoven to create a satirical look at English society.

books.title: The Night Land
books.author: William Hope Hodgson
books.summary: A 17th-century gentleman is reincarnated on a far-future Earth where the sun has died, and scours the hellish landscape for his lost love.

books.title: While the Billy Boils
books.author: Henry Lawson
books.summary: A short story collection based on Australian colonial life in 1890s.

books.title: Polynesian Mythology
books.author: George Grey
books.summary: A collection of Māori mythology covering the start of the universe through to the spread of Māori tribes through New Zealand’s North Island.

books.title: The Cruise of the Alerte
books.author: E. F. Knight
books.summary: An English journalist sets sail in search of treasure buried on a remote desert island.
